items.title: Dawn Row — Open Water
items.description: Optional early-morning row to greet the solstice sunrise. All experience levels welcome.

items.title: Registration & Check-in Opens
items.description: Pick up your race packet, number, and timing chip at the main tent.

items.title: Welcome Ceremony
items.description: Opening remarks from event organizers and safety briefing.

items.title: Single Scull — 5K Race
items.description: Individual sculling event. Course marked with buoys on the lake.

items.title: Double Scull & Pair — 5K Race
items.description: Two-person boat categories. Heats assigned at check-in.

items.title: Lunch & Open Paddle
items.description: Community lunch provided. Open-water recreational row open to all.

items.title: Four & Eight — 5K Race
items.description: Coxed and coxless four, plus eight-person shells compete.

items.title: Awards Ceremony
items.description: Medal and trophy presentation for all race categories.

items.title: Solstice Sunset Social
items.description: Celebrate the longest day with fellow rowers. Food, music, and community.
